questions: Planning des employés pour la semaine prochaine
queries.sql: SELECT s.firstname, s.lastname, wws.week_start_date, wws.total_hours, wws.schedule FROM staff s JOIN worker_weekly_schedule wws ON s.id = wws.staff_id WHERE wws.week_start_date = date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 week')::date ORDER BY s.lastname, s.firstname
queries.description: Planning du personnel pour la semaine prochaine avec leur nombre d'heures programmées

queries.sql: SELECT s.firstname, s.lastname, s.role, (wws.schedule->>to_char('[DATE]'::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))::jsonb->>'hours' AS hours_scheduled, (wws.schedule->>to_char('[DATE]'::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))::jsonb->>'project' AS project_name FROM staff s JOIN worker_weekly_schedule wws ON s.id = wws.staff_id WHERE wws.week_start_date <= '[DATE]'::date AND wws.week_start_date + INTERVAL '6 days' >= '[DATE]'::date AND (wws.schedule->>to_char('[DATE]'::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.lastname, s.firstname
queries.description: Liste des employés programmés pour travailler à une date spécifique

queries.sql: SELECT s.firstname, s.lastname, s.role, ps.role AS project_role, ps.start_date, ps.end_date FROM staff s JOIN project_staff ps ON s.id = ps.staff_id JOIN projects p ON ps.project_id = p.id WHERE p.name ILIKE '%[PROJECT]%' OR p.id::text = '[PROJECT]' ORDER BY ps.role, s.lastname, s.firstname
queries.description: Liste des employés assignés à un projet spécifique avec leur rôle

queries.sql: SELECT ce.title, ce.description, ce.start_date, ce.end_date, ce.location, ret.name AS event_type, p.name AS project_name, s.firstname || ' ' || s.lastname AS staff_name FROM calendar_events ce LEFT JOIN ref_event_types ret ON ce.event_type = ret.id LEFT JOIN projects p ON ce.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN staff s ON ce.staff_id = s.id WHERE DATE(ce.start_date) = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY ce.start_date
queries.description: Liste de tous les événements programmés pour aujourd'hui

queries.sql: SELECT ce.title, ce.description, ce.start_date, ce.end_date, ce.location, ret.name AS event_type, p.name AS project_name, s.firstname || ' ' || s.lastname AS staff_name FROM calendar_events ce LEFT JOIN ref_event_types ret ON ce.event_type = ret.id LEFT JOIN projects p ON ce.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN staff s ON ce.staff_id = s.id WHERE DATE(ce.start_date) = CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' ORDER BY ce.start_date
queries.description: Liste de tous les événements programmés pour demain

questions: Quels sont les événements cette semaine ?
Programme de la semaine en cours
queries.sql: SELECT ce.title, ce.description, to_char(ce.start_date, 'Day DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') as start_date_formatted, ce.location, ret.name AS event_type, p.name AS project_name FROM calendar_events ce LEFT JOIN ref_event_types ret ON ce.event_type = ret.id LEFT JOIN projects p ON ce.project_id = p.id WHERE DATE(ce.start_date) BETWEEN date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE)::date AND (date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '6 days')::date ORDER BY ce.start_date
queries.description: Liste de tous les événements programmés pour la semaine en cours

questions: Quels sont les événements la semaine prochaine ?
queries.sql: SELECT ce.title, ce.description, to_char(ce.start_date, 'Day DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') as start_date_formatted, ce.location, ret.name AS event_type, p.name AS project_name FROM calendar_events ce LEFT JOIN ref_event_types ret ON ce.event_type = ret.id LEFT JOIN projects p ON ce.project_id = p.id WHERE DATE(ce.start_date) BETWEEN date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 week')::date AND (date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 week') + INTERVAL '6 days')::date ORDER BY ce.start_date
queries.description: Liste de tous les événements programmés pour la semaine prochaine

questions: Quels sont les événements ce mois-ci ?
queries.sql: SELECT ce.title, ce.description, to_char(ce.start_date, 'Day DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') as start_date_formatted, ce.location, ret.name AS event_type, p.name AS project_name FROM calendar_events ce LEFT JOIN ref_event_types ret ON ce.event_type = ret.id LEFT JOIN projects p ON ce.project_id = p.id WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ce.start_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ce.start_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY ce.start_date
queries.description: Liste de tous les événements programmés pour le mois en cours

questions: Quels sont les événements de type [TYPE] ?
queries.sql: SELECT ce.title, ce.description, to_char(ce.start_date, 'Day DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') as start_date_formatted, ce.location, p.name AS project_name, s.firstname || ' ' || s.lastname AS staff_name FROM calendar_events ce JOIN ref_event_types ret ON ce.event_type = ret.id LEFT JOIN projects p ON ce.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN staff s ON ce.staff_id = s.id WHERE ret.name ILIKE '%[TYPE]%' OR ret.code ILIKE '%[TYPE]%' ORDER BY ce.start_date
queries.description: Liste des événements filtrés par type spécifique

parameters.name: TYPE
parameters.description: Type d'événement (appel_telephonique, reunion_chantier, visite_technique, rendez_vous_client, reunion_interne)

questions: Quels sont les événements entre [START_DATE] et [END_DATE] ?
queries.sql: SELECT ce.title, ce.description, to_char(ce.start_date, 'Day DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') as start_date_formatted, ce.location, ret.name AS event_type, p.name AS project_name FROM calendar_events ce LEFT JOIN ref_event_types ret ON ce.event_type = ret.id LEFT JOIN projects p ON ce.project_id = p.id WHERE DATE(ce.start_date) BETWEEN '[START_DATE]'::date AND '[END_DATE]'::date ORDER BY ce.start_date
queries.description: Liste des événements programmés dans une plage de dates spécifique

questions: Quels sont les événements pour le projet [PROJECT] ?
queries.sql: SELECT ce.title, ce.description, to_char(ce.start_date, 'Day DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') as start_date_formatted, ce.location, ret.name AS event_type, s.firstname || ' ' || s.lastname AS staff_name FROM calendar_events ce LEFT JOIN ref_event_types ret ON ce.event_type = ret.id JOIN projects p ON ce.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN staff s ON ce.staff_id = s.id WHERE p.name ILIKE '%[PROJECT]%' OR p.id::text = '[PROJECT]' ORDER BY ce.start_date
queries.description: Liste des événements associés à un projet spécifique

queries.sql: SELECT ce.title, ce.description, to_char(ce.start_date, 'Day DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') as start_date_formatted, ce.location, ret.name AS event_type, p.name AS project_name FROM calendar_events ce LEFT JOIN ref_event_types ret ON ce.event_type = ret.id LEFT JOIN projects p ON ce.project_id = p.id JOIN staff s ON ce.staff_id = s.id WHERE (s.firstname || ' ' || s.lastname) ILIKE '%[STAFF]%' OR s.email ILIKE '%[STAFF]%' ORDER BY ce.start_date
queries.description: Liste des événements associés à un membre du personnel spécifique

parameters.name: STAFF
parameters.description: Nom ou email du membre du personnel

queries.sql: SELECT ce.title, ce.description, to_char(ce.start_date, 'Day DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') as start_date_formatted, ce.location, ret.name AS event_type, p.name AS project_name, s.firstname || ' ' || s.lastname AS staff_name FROM calendar_events ce LEFT JOIN ref_event_types ret ON ce.event_type = ret.id LEFT JOIN projects p ON ce.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN staff s ON ce.staff_id = s.id WHERE ce.start_date > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ORDER BY ce.start_date LIMIT 10

questions: Quels sont les jours les plus chargés ?
queries.sql: SELECT DATE(ce.start_date) AS day, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM calendar_events ce WHERE ce.start_date >= CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY DATE(ce.start_date) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10
queries.description: Liste des 10 jours avec le plus grand nombre d'événements programmés

questions: Quelles visites de chantier sont programmées ?
queries.sql: SELECT ce.title, ce.description, to_char(ce.start_date, 'Day DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') as start_date_formatted, ce.location, p.name AS project_name, s.firstname || ' ' || s.lastname AS staff_name FROM calendar_events ce JOIN ref_event_types ret ON ce.event_type = ret.id LEFT JOIN projects p ON ce.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN staff s ON ce.staff_id = s.id WHERE (ret.code = 'visite_technique' OR ret.code = 'reunion_chantier') AND ce.start_date > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ORDER BY ce.start_date
queries.description: Liste des visites de chantier et réunions sur site programmées

queries.sql: SELECT ce.title, ce.description, to_char(ce.start_date, 'Day DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') as start_date_formatted, ce.location, p.name AS project_name, s.firstname || ' ' || s.lastname AS staff_name, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name FROM calendar_events ce JOIN ref_event_types ret ON ce.event_type = ret.id LEFT JOIN projects p ON ce.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN staff s ON ce.staff_id = s.id LEFT JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id WHERE ret.code = 'rendez_vous_client' AND ce.start_date > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ORDER BY ce.start_date
queries.description: Liste des rendez-vous avec les clients programmés

questions: Quelles sont les échéances ce mois-ci ?
queries.sql: SELECT p.name AS project_name, s.name AS stage_name, s.end_date, c.firstname || ' ' || c.lastname AS client_name, rs.name AS status, CASE WHEN s.end_date < CURRENT_DATE THEN 'En retard' ELSE 'À venir' END AS deadline_status FROM stages s JOIN projects p ON s.project_id = p.id JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id JOIN ref_status rs ON s.status = rs.id WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM s.end_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.end_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY s.end_date
queries.description: Liste des échéances d'étapes de projets pour le mois courant

questions: Quels sont les derniers rapports de chantier ?
queries.sql: SELECT dsr.id, dsr.report_date, p.name AS project_name, dsr.weather_conditions, dsr.temperature, dsr.hours_worked, dsr.work_done, s.firstname || ' ' || s.lastname AS reported_by FROM daily_site_reports dsr JOIN projects p ON dsr.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN staff s ON dsr.staff_id = s.id ORDER BY dsr.report_date DESC LIMIT 10
queries.description: Liste des 10 derniers rapports journaliers de chantier

questions: Quels points de contrôle qualité arrivent à échéance ?
queries.sql: SELECT qc.name, qc.description, qc.deadline, p.name AS project_name, s.name AS stage_name, rqcs.name AS status FROM quality_checkpoints qc JOIN projects p ON qc.project_id = p.id JOIN stages s ON qc.stage_id = s.id JOIN ref_quality_checkpoint_status rqcs ON qc.status = rqcs.id WHERE qc.deadline BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '14 days') AND rqcs.code != 'validé' ORDER BY qc.deadline
queries.description: Liste des points de contrôle qualité à effectuer dans les deux prochaines semaines
